senses.gloss: to be dusty, to be covered with dust, to have earth on oneself
to be so poor as to cleave to the dust

examples.text: أَمَّا مُعَاوِيَةُ فَرَجُلٌ تَرِبَ لَا مَالَ لَهُ
examples.english: So far as Muʿāwiya is concerned, he is a poor man without any property.

senses.gloss: to put earth on, to sprinkle with dust
to cover with dust or earth
cleaving to the dust by reason of want, destitute
